fields.explanation: salom = hello
yes = ha

fields.hint: Oilada otangiz yoki onangizning kasbi haqida o'ylab ko'ring.
fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

___, I don't want it.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "no". Misol: No, I don't want it.

fields.text: "thank you" so'zining o'zbek tilidagi tarjimasi qaysi?
fields.explanation: thank you = rahmat
please = iltimos

fields.text: My ___ is a girl. She is younger than me.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "sister". Misol: My sister lives in London.

fields.text: I have one ___. He is older than me and he likes football.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "brother". Misol: I have one brother.

fields.text: My ___ is a man. He drives to work every morning.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "father". Misol: His father works in a bank.

fields.text: We are a big ___. There are six people in my house.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "family". Misol: We are a big family.

fields.text: My ___ is a woman. She cooks dinner every evening.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "mother". Misol: My mother is a teacher.

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

I ___ some water.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "want". Misol: I want some water.
bormoq = go
like = yoqmoq

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

She studies English.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "study". Misol: She studies English.
eat = yemoq

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

I ___ to school.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "go". Misol: I go to school.
o'qimoq = study

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

I ___ breakfast at 8.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "eat". Misol: I eat breakfast at 8.

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

I ___ in Tashkent.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "work". Misol: I work in Tashkent.
drink = ichmoq

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

___ is on the table.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "bread". Misol: Bread is on the table.
suv = water
qahva = coffee

fields.text:
Bo'sh joyga mos so'zni yozing:

The ___ is delicious.
fields.explanation: To'g'ri javob: "food". Misol: The food is delicious.
choy = tea

fields.text: How many letters does the English alphabet have?

Where do students play sports at school?

Complete: "Last weekend, I ___ to the beach."

Complete: "We ___ a great time at the party."

What kind of text describes a famous person's life?

How do you ask about someone's past holiday?
Complete: "We ___ a lot of photos on our trip."
Which word describes a fun holiday?
